untranslatable_reason: Point-and-figure chart pattern logic (X/O column tracking and trend continuation) cannot be expressed using available price-based indicators. This requires custom point-and-figure charting logic not representable in the standard indicator framework. The signal requires tracking multi-bar formations and box-size reversals that are inherent to P&F methodology, not standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: This is a point-and-figure charting strategy that fundamentally requires building and tracking P&F columns with X and O markers at specified box sizes. The entry/exit conditions provided are approximations using price reversal logic (close vs prev_close), but they do not capture the true essence of P&F chart pattern recognition which involves threshold reversals based on custom box sizing and column continuation rules. A proper backtest would require a custom P&F chart engine.
